/usr/bin/ar qc libsgb.a CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/apu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/gamepad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/lcd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mbc1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mbc2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mbc3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mbc5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mbc7.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/huc1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mmm01.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/mmu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/z80.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/custom_graphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/sio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/dmg07.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/__/dmg/gbma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sgb.dir/debug.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsgb.a
